message.content:
@startuml
title Planning Scenario 'default operator information' - V1.0.0

participant "MP" as MP #LightBlue
participant "Lookup" as Lookup #LavenderBlush
participant "TO" as TO #PaleGreen2

note over MP,LavenderBlush : Endpoints that could be used by the MP:\n/operator/meta\n/operator/available-assets\n/operator/stations\n/operator/regions\n/operator/operating-calendar\n/operator/operating-hours\n/operator/pricing-plans\n/operator/information

activate TO
MP ->> TO: e.g. /operator/available-assets
deactivate TO

activate TO
TO -->> MP: available assettypes (optionally containing assets)
deactivate TO

note right of LavenderBlush,PaleTurquoise3 : ProcessIdentifiers: DEFAULT

note left of PaleTurquoise4,Skyblue : Endpoints that could be used by the MP:\n/operator/meta\n/operator/information\n/operator/regions

activate TO
LavenderBlush->> Skyblue: e.g. /operator/meta
Skyblue-->> LavenderBlush: precise description of the implementation of the API 
@enduml
